query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS technical_resources (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  type ENUM('PDF', 'VIDEO', 'LINK') NOT NULL,
  file_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('INSTALLATION', 'MAINTENANCE', 'TROUBLESHOOTING', 'TECHNICAL_SPECS', 'TRAINING', 'OTHER') NOT NULL,
  product_category ENUM('SPAS', 'SWIM_SPAS', 'MAINTENANCE', 'COVERS', 'ACCESSORIES', 'OTHER'),
  tags TEXT,
  view_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  created_by INT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS technical_resources (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  type ENUM('PDF', 'VIDEO', 'LINK') NOT NULL,
  file_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('INSTALLATION', 'MAINTENANCE', 'TROUBLESHOOTING', 'TECHNICAL_SPECS', 'TRAINING', 'OTHER') NOT NULL,
  product_category ENUM('SPAS', 'SWIM_SPAS', 'MAINTENANCE', 'COVERS', 'ACCESSORIES', 'OTHER'),
  tags TEXT,
  view_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  created_by INT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id)
)
